title: Building AGI Using Language Models (2020)
abstract: Are you curious about whether the future will bring AI as advanced as C-3PO from Star Wars? Well, here’s your chance! "Building AGI Using Language Models (2020)" dives into how current language models can be harnessed to develop a general artificial intelligence. Imagine giving machines the power of speech and thought. Join us in this exciting tech journey!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也想知道未来会不会出现像《星球大战》里的C-3PO那样的超智能机器人？那现在就有个机会！这工具《2020年使用语言模型构建AGI》，带你一起探索如何用现有的语言模型来打造未来的通用人工智能。就像给机器装上“嘴”，让它们学会说话、思考，甚至理解你的心思。快来加入这场科技盛宴吧！
